title: Partial Merkle Proofs
description: A compact proof that a transaction belongs to a block by sending only the relevant Merkle branches and a bit field describing the traversed tree, allowing an SPV client to verify inclusion without downloading every transaction.

resources.title: BIP 37: Connection Bloom Filtering
resources.notes: Defines merkleblock messages and partial Merkle tree proofs used by legacy SPV clients.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin: The Blockchain
resources.notes: Explains how a lightweight client verifies transaction inclusion with a partial Merkle branch.

resources.title: Mastering Bitcoin
resources.notes: Provides the broader block, Merkle-tree, and lightweight-client context for partial proofs.
